title: Property Consultant - Mindspace Business Parks REIT - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Mindspace Business Parks REIT - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Mindspace Business Parks REIT in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindspace Business Parks REIT:
Mindspace Business Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindspace Business Parks REIT!
